This design ensures each module can be unit tested with the Communication libraries.</div><div><br></div><div>This holds good as long as there are no cross linkings introduced by the team.</div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="190" width="290" height="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xyD_zk1-Fck_-DipB7pS-9" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;"><b>AppLauncher.lvlib</b></font><div>Does not directly depend on any Modules, reads the ModulesInfo.ini and Asynchronously launches all the Modules</div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1ba1e2;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#006EAF;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="500" width="380" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xyD_zk1-Fck_-DipB7pS-11" value="ModulesInfo.ini<div><br></div><div>[Modules]</div><div>ModuleA = Modules\ModuleA\Main.vi</div><div>ModuleB = Modules\ModuleB\Main.vi</div><div>ModuleC = Modules\ModuleC\Main.vi</div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffff88;strokeColor=#36393d;align=left;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="95" y="590" width="370" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xyD_zk1-Fck_-DipB7pS-12" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="xyD_zk1-Fck_-DipB7pS-9" target="xyD_zk1-Fck_-DipB7pS-11"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="280" y="570" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="600" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
1. ModuleA, ModuleB, and ModuleC are developed for different purposes. They should be independent of each other.
2. There are separate Communication libraries that hold Queue References
3.. ABComm.lvlib is a communication library that holds queue references of A and B along with a set of commands / message lvclasses.
4. Similarly ACComm.lvlib is another communication library that holds queue refernces of A and C along with a set of commands / message lvclasses.
5. This design ensures each module can be unit tested with the Communication libraries.
This holds good as long as there are no cross linkings introduced by the team.

div.div:
ModulesInfo.ini
[Modules]
ModuleA = Modules\ModuleA\Main.vi
ModuleB = Modules\ModuleB\Main.vi
ModuleC = Modules\ModuleC\Main.vi
